name: Molasses Apricot Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. In a medium bowl, mix together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, ginger, and allspice until blended well.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat sugar and butter at medium speed until mixture forms a grainy paste. Scrape sides of the bowl.
4. Add molasses and egg; beat until light and fluffy.
5. Add the flour mixture and apricots; blend on low speed just until combined. Do not overmix.
6. Divide dough in half and shape each half into a roll about 1 1/2 inches in diameter. Wrap rolls in waxed paper and chill until firm.
7. Slice cookies 1/4-inch thick and place on ungreased cookie sheets about 2 inches apart. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the cookies are set.
8. Transfer to a cool surface.
Icing: In a small bowl, blend sugar, milk, and vanilla extract until smooth. Drizzle icing over the cooled cookies.
